allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
VendeeX 2.0 Demo with transparent cost breakdown and ACP checkout

Includes full transparent pricing engine, jurisdiction-aware tax calculation,
demo customer auto-population, and ACP checkout flow with pre-filled shipping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add transparent discount source labelling throughout checkout flow

Discounts now show their origin \(e.g. "Retailer price reduction" or
"Retailer promotional sale"\) in cart items, order summary, and ACP
session data — making pricing fully transparent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
